Off Calendar Apr-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's Motion for a Protective Order Staying the Taking of Plaintiff's Deposition and to Compel Plaintiffs to Issue Authorizations for Records, and for Monetary Sanctions.
Dept. 611, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Joe Vickstein, #4780.

Stephen M. Fishback, Esq. and Cassiana Aaronson, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Thomas Engstrom and Jeri Engstrom.
Natasha Sumner, Esq. appeared for defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation.

After hearing argument by counsel, and good cause appearing, defendant Metalclad Insulations's Corporation's Motion for a Protective Order Staying the Taking of Plaintiff's Deposition, and to Compel Plaintiffs to Issue Authorizations for Records is GRANTED. Plaintiff's deposition is stayed pending delivery of records pursuant to General Order 129. Plaintiff's deposition shall go forward when the requested records are delivered to designated defense counsel, Berry & Berry.

Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED.
